## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Chore

## Checklist

- [ ] I have run the relevant tests locally.
- [ ] I have run TypeScript checks where applicable.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, tokens, private keys, passwords, internal hostnames, or private IP addresses.
- [ ] API routes that access organization data are scoped by `organizationId`.
- [ ] New or changed environment variables are documented in `.env.example`.
- [ ] User-facing behavior is documented where needed.
- [ ] I have signed the CLA, or I am ready to sign it when the CLA bot asks.

## Testing

List the commands you ran and the result.

```bash
# example:
npm test
npm exec tsc -- --noEmit
```

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or recordings for UI changes.

## Notes for reviewers

Mention anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
